# date / inline

The **date** type's `data-view.cell-editor` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.CellEditor({ match: "date", ... })` — a compact
`DateEditor`: an autofocused native `<input type="date">` (the date filter's
native-control chrome) seeded from the value's ISO calendar day. Commits a
`Date | null` on Enter / blur (empty ⇒ `null`) and cancels on Esc.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Date field type: data-view inline cell editor (native date input editor).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.CellEditor` "date" → `DateEditor`
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`
